PARAM.name: citation
PARAM.DESCRIPTION: How to cite and acknowledge Gaia:

PARAM.name: terms
PARAM.DESCRIPTION: Terms and conditions for use of Gaia data:

FIELD.name: solution_id
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Solution Identifier

FIELD.name: source_id
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Unique source identifier

FIELD.name: transit_id
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Transit Identifier

FIELD.name: ra0
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Right ascension of reference point

FIELD.name: dec0
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Declination of reference point

FIELD.name: agis_source_excess_noise
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: the unscaled AGIS Source Excess Noise

FIELD.name: obs_time_tcb
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: effective observing time as TCB

FIELD.name: obs_time_bary_corr
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: barycentric correction to obsTimeTcb

FIELD.name: scan_pos_angle
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Position angle of the scan

FIELD.name: zeta
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: across-scan field angle zeta of the reference point (ra0, dec0)

FIELD.name: parallax_factor_al
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Parallax factor AL

FIELD.name: parallax_factor_ac
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Parallax factor AC

FIELD.name: colour_factor_al
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: colour factor AL

FIELD.name: colour_factor_ac
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: colour factor AC

FIELD.name: nu_eff_used_in_astrometry
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: colour (i.e. effective wavenumber) used in AGIS (and in IPD)

FIELD.name: nu_eff_error
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: standard error of nuEffUsedInAstrometry

FIELD.name: centroid_pos_al
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Local plane coordinate (w) of image centroid AL

FIELD.name: centroid_pos_ac
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Local plane coordinate (z) of image centroid AC

FIELD.name: calculated_pos_ac
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Calculated Local plane coordinate (z)

FIELD.name: centroid_pos_error_al
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: standard error of centroidPosAl

FIELD.name: centroid_pos_error_ac
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: standard error of centroidPosAc

FIELD.name: used_by_agis_al
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: whether the CCD transit was used in AL by AGIS-DR4

FIELD.name: used_by_agis_ac
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: whether the CCD transit was used in AC by AGIS-DR4

FIELD.name: transit_acq_flags
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Transit-level information on the on-board acquisition

FIELD.name: transit_proc_flags
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Transit-level information on the processing results

FIELD.name: ccd_proc_flags
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: CCD-level information on the processing results

FIELD.name: multipeak
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: True if the AstroElementary is multipeak; false otherwise

FIELD.name: blended
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: True if the peak for this source is also matched to another source

FIELD.name: ipd_error_al
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: standard error of IDU IPD centroid AL

FIELD.name: ipd_error_ac
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: standard error of IDU IPD centroid AC (NaN for 1d windows)

FIELD.name: g_mag
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: G Magnitude, either from CU5 or from on-board estimate

FIELD.name: g_class
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Window class used in SM, AF and XP

FIELD.name: gates
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Gate information for all CCDs

FIELD.name: source_dist_to_last_ci
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: source distance to last charge injection

FIELD.name: ac_rate
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: AstroElementary AC rates for the transit time

FIELD.name: sub_pixel_coord
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Subpixel coordinate AL

FIELD.name: mu
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Ac coordinate of the image (or window centre) on a CCD
